description: Database under pressure from slow queries + exhausted connection pool. Multiple defensible action categories (query optimization vs pool sizing), both legitimate. Slow database queries. query_cache_optimization is the canonical fix; pool_sizing was an alternative framing but the primary action is query/index optimization.
action_category_rationale: The fix is two-pronged: optimize slow queries AND increase the connection pool. Either action_category framing captures a legitimate primary lens on the problem.
